name: chaser-lite
description: Cut the cost of Claude Code: audit wasted tokens, shrink the system prompt, and compress verbose command outputs (tests, lint, git) before they enter your context — error signals always preserved. 100% local, zero cloud, zero dependencies. Free and deliberately capped — the full version, ~5x more developed (multi-model orchestration engine, tamper-proof Merkle journal, semantic cache, long-term memory, real-time Cockpit, Security Shield), is Chaser Pro: chaser-orchestrator.com/en.html
